pet_notes: Non-furry, non-animal compact signal-stack robot pet. A small matte graphite stacked beacon module with rounded hardware tiers, teal/cyan edge bands, one amber lens or status aperture, a short antenna mast, tiny caster base, and attached cartridge tray with abstract rounded data tiles. Practical GTM signal console companion; reads like mobile workflow hardware, not a creature. No fur, no ears, no tail, no paws, no animal face, no humanoid mascot costume, no readable text, no logos, no UI screenshots.
style_notes: Same family as Ops Core contact sheet: polished sticker-style hardware pet, crisp dark outline, graphite/teal/cyan/amber palette, flat clean colors, minimal shading, no shadows, no detached effects, clearly mechanical and not animal-like.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: Same family as Ops Core contact sheet: polished sticker-style hardware pet, crisp dark outline, graphite/teal/cyan/amber palette, flat clean colors, minimal shading, no shadows, no detached effects, clearly mechanical and not animal-like..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
